query: I just inherited this FastAPI codebase and I need to understand the data flow from ingestion to response. Can you walk through it and produce something I can share with the new junior dev next week?

We're publishing internal docs next quarter. I need a structured map of how our Nuxt app handles a typical request — pages, server routes, state — saved somewhere I can hand-edit before generating the visual.
Run /explore-pipeline on this repo, the backend is in api/ and the front is in web/
Map out my project pipeline as JSON so I can hand it off to /explain-panel afterwards
Analyse my codebase end-to-end and write the result to docs/pipeline-map.json, I want to know what /explain-panel will see
Refactor my pipeline so it's faster — the embedding step is the bottleneck
Explain what RAG means and how cosine distance works in ChromaDB
Write tests for my ingestion pipeline so I can refactor it confidently
Why is my retrieval returning weird results? Looks like the embedding model changed
Document my API endpoints in OpenAPI format and publish them to Postman
